{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/52005121?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/joniumGit", "id": 52005121, "login": "joniumGit", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjUyMDA1MTIx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/joniumGit", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40299", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "### Impact

Applications using the `next-intl` middleware with `localePrefix: 'as-needed'` could construct URLs where path handling and the WHATWG URL parser resolved a relative redirect target to another host (e.g. scheme-relative `//` or control characters stripped by the URL parser), so the middleware could redirect the browser off-site while the user still started from a trusted app URL.

### Patches

The problem has been patched, please update to [`next-intl@4.9.1`](https://github.com/amannn/next-intl/releases/tag/v4.9.1).

### Credits

Many thanks to [Joni Liljeblad](https://github.com/joniumGit) from [Oura](https://ouraring.com) for responsibly disclosing the vulnerability and for suggesting the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00339, "percentile": 0.25587}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8f24-v5vv-gm5j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-10T21:03:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f24-v5vv-gm5j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8f24-v5vv-gm5j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40299"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-17T21:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-04-10T21:03:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/amannn/next-intl/security/advisories/GHSA-8f24-v5vv-gm5j", "https://github.com/amannn/next-intl/pull/2304", "https://github.com/amannn/next-intl/commit/1c80b668aa6d853f470319eec10a3f61e78a70e6", "https://github.com/amannn/next-intl/releases/tag/v4.9.1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40299", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f24-v5vv-gm5j"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/amannn/next-intl/security-advisories/GHSA-8f24-v5vv-gm5j", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/amannn/next-intl", "summary": "next-intl has an open redirect vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:48:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f24-v5vv-gm5j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next-intl"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: next-intl has an open redirect vulnerability
